name: Easy Marinated Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow 4 spears of fresh asparagus per serving.
2. Dip asparagus in boiling water for 30 seconds, then drain immediately.
3. Pour Paul Newman Salad Dressing over the asparagus, ensuring each spear is coated.
4. Cover the asparagus with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight to marinate.
5. Serve on a lettuce leaf once marinated.
